import pytest
from source import quicksort

def test_quicksort_preserves_duplicates_and_sorts():
    input_list = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    sorted_expected = sorted(input_list)
    result = quicksort(input_list)
    assert result == sorted_expected, (
        f"Expected {sorted_expected}, got {result}"
    )
    assert len(result) == len(input_list), (
        f"Expected length {len(input_list)}, got {len(result)}"
    )
